query:
-- 1. Apollo credit log — total credits used, by action type
SELECT action, COUNT(*) as calls, SUM(creditsUsed) as totalCredits,
       MIN(DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000))) as firstUse,
       MAX(DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000))) as lastUse
FROM apolloCreditLog
GROUP BY action ORDER BY totalCredits DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- 1. Apollo credit log — total credits used, by action type
SELECT action, COUNT(*) as calls, SUM(creditsUsed) as totalCredits,
       MIN(DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000))) as firstUse,
       MAX(DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000))) as lastUse
FROM apolloCreditLog
GROUP BY action ORDER BY totalCredits DESC;
